_comment: Drifted fixture: one repo still pins the ungated pre-tag ref (no release-approval wall). The gate exits 1 and names the repo.
cinatra-ai/example-connector:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    uses: cinatra-ai/.github/.github/workflows/reusable-extension-release.yml@1e4448a75dc27b7be4d52ac3ce0734fa7c766957 # v0.1.1
    secrets: inherit
cinatra-ai/example-drifted:
name: release
on:
  push:
    tags: ['v*']
jobs:
  release:
    uses: cinatra-ai/.github/.github/workflows/reusable-extension-release.yml@fea09b38e94c0a64f7fab3c02d34b0fe1ecf746d # v0.1.0
    secrets: inherit
